headline: KRX CEO talks about Korea's foreign investors & MSCI DM prospects
summary: Jeong Eun-Bo, CEO & Chairman of the Korea Exchange (KRX), talks to CNBC's Lisa Kim about foreign investment in the South Korean markets, and evaluates the country's chances of ascending the MSCI Developed Markets Index.
